overview:
## Discussion

Sessions start in the [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/State-swift.enum/management] state. Calls to the wired or card emulation APIs change the state to [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/State-swift.enum/wired(credential:)] or [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/State-swift.enum/cardEmulation(credential:)]. Leaving wired or card emulation mode returns the state to [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/State-swift.enum/management].

Explicitly invalidating the session, encountering an error, or the app entering the background changes the state to [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/State-swift.enum/invalid]. An invalid session can’t return to one of the other states.

# state

**Instance Property**

The current state of the session.

## Declaration

```swift
var state: CredentialSession.State { get async }
```

## Discussion

Sessions start in the [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/State-swift.enum/management] state. Calls to the wired or card emulation APIs change the state to [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/State-swift.enum/wired(credential:)] or [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/State-swift.enum/cardEmulation(credential:)]. Leaving wired or card emulation mode returns the state to [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/State-swift.enum/management].

Explicitly invalidating the session, encountering an error, or the app entering the background changes the state to [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/State-swift.enum/invalid]. An invalid session can’t return to one of the other states.

## Accessing the session state

- **CredentialSession.State**: An enumeration of the possible states of a card session.
